title: RACING GAME detail page » GAMING PLATFORMS
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the RACING GAME detail page to show all connected GAMING PLATFORMS
So I can ...
description:
* The RACING GAME detail page contains a section with a list of all connected GAMING PLATFORMS.
* Each GAMING PLATFORM in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each GAMING PLATFORM in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each GAMING PLATFORM in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no GAMING PLATFORM connected to the RACING GAME then the section is not displayed at all.
